zh.lifeSummary: 當John De Beauchamp於大約1325年出生在英國薩默塞特利勒達時，他的父親Hugh de Beauchamp36歲，母親Idonea Lisle33歲。他於1355年與Joan Bridport在英國英格蘭薩默塞特陶頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1396年在他的家鄉享年72歲。

zh-hans.Bristol, Gloucestershire, England: 英国格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托
zh-hans.Grafton, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾葛拉芙頓

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John De Beauchamp于大约1325年出生在英国薩默塞特利勒達时，他的父亲Hugh de Beauchamp36岁，母亲Idonea Lisle33岁。他于1355年与Joan Bridport在英国英格兰薩默塞特陶頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1396年在他的家乡享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beauchamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Beecham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Beauchamp  , reflecting the normal English pronunciation.

variants.name: Beachem
meanings: English (Somerset and Gloucestershire): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Beachum
meanings: Altered form of English   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Bagent
meanings: English:
possibly a colloquial pronunciation of Beauchamp or Beecham . Old French Beau- often appears as Be(e)- in English surnames. The -ch- has been voiced and excrescent -t has been added.

perhaps an Anglicized form of a French or Flemish surname such as Beaujean and Bejean, from Old French bel Jehan ‘handsome John’ + excrescent -t. It could have been introduced to England in the 15th or 16th century by Flemish migrants.

variants.name: Beacham
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Campbell
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Bushaw
meanings: Americanized form of French   Beauchamp   and   Bouchard  .

variants.name: Beacom
meanings: English (Somerset) and Irish (Fermanagh): of Norman origin, a variant of   Beauchamp  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John De Beauchamp was born about 1325, in Lillesdon, Somerset, England, his father, Hugh de Beauchamp, was 36 and his mother, Idonea Lisle, was 33. He married Joan Bridport in 1355, in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in 1396, in his hometown, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John De Beauchamp est né environ 1325, à Lillesdon, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Beauchamp, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Idonea Lisle, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Joan Bridport en 1355, à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1396, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John De Beauchamp um 1325 in Lillesdon, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Beauchamp 36 und seine Mutter Idonea Lisle 33. Er hat 1355 in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Joan Bridport geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1396 im Alter von 72 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John De Beauchamp è nato il circa 1325 nel Lillesdon, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Hugh de Beauchamp, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Idonea Lisle, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Joan Bridport nel 1355, nel Taunton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1396, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John De Beauchampが約1325年にイギリスソメルセトリレスドンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Beauchampは36歳，母Idonea Lisleは33歳であった。1355年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトタウントンでJoan Bridportと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1396年に故郷で72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John De Beauchamp(이)가 대략 1325년 영국 서머세트 릴레즈던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Beauchamp(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Idonea Lisle(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 타운턴에서 Joan Bridport(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1396년 그의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John De Beauchamp nasceu aproximadamente 1325, em Lillesdon, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Beauchamp, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Idonea Lisle, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Bridport em 1355, em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1396, em sua cidade natal, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John De Beauchamp родился около 1325 г. в местности лиллесдон, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Beauchamp было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Idonea Lisle, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Bridport в 1355 г. в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1396 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John De Beauchamp nació aproximadamente 1325, en Lillesdon, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Beauchamp, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Idonea Lisle, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Joan Bridport en 1355, en Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1396, en su pueblo, a la edad de 72 años.
